field.name: nas-5gs.security_header_type

field.showname: 0000 .... = Type of ciphering algorithm: 5G-EA0 (null ciphering algorithm) (0)

field.showname: .... 0... = Type of security context flag (TSC): Native security context (for KSIAMF)

field.show: UE security capability - Replayed UE security capabilities

field.name: nas-5gs.mm.rinmr
field.showname: .... ..1. = Retransmission of initial NAS message request (RINMR): Requested

field.name: frame.time_delta_displayed
field.showname: Time delta from previous displayed frame: 0.000104577 seconds

field.name: frame.time_relative
field.showname: Time since reference or first frame: 75.484848751 seconds

field.name: ip.dsfield
field.showname: Differentiated Services Field: 0x00 (DSCP: CS0, ECN: Not-ECT)

field.name: ip.dsfield.ecn
field.showname: .... ..00 = Explicit Congestion Notification: Not ECN-Capable Transport (0)

proto.name: udp
proto.showname: User Datagram Protocol, Src Port: 4997, Dst Port: 38466

field.name: per.optional_field_bit
field.showname: ..0. .... Optional Field Bit: False (cellSelectionInfo is NOT present)

field.showname: ...0 .... Optional Field Bit: False (connEstFailureControl is NOT present)

field.showname: .... 0... Optional Field Bit: False (si-SchedulingInfo is NOT present)

field.showname: .... .0.. Optional Field Bit: False (servingCellConfigCommon is NOT present)

field.showname: .... ..0. Optional Field Bit: False (ims-EmergencySupport is NOT present)

field.showname: .... ...0 Optional Field Bit: False (eCallOverIMS-Support is NOT present)

field.showname: 0... .... Optional Field Bit: False (ue-TimersAndConstants is NOT present)

field.name: per.optional_field_bit
field.showname: .1.. .... Optional Field Bit: True (uac-BarringInfo is present)

field.name: per.optional_field_bit
field.showname: ..0. .... Optional Field Bit: False (useFullResumeID is NOT present)

field.showname: ...0 .... Optional Field Bit: False (lateNonCriticalExtension is NOT present)

field.showname: .... 0... Optional Field Bit: False (nonCriticalExtension is NOT present)

field.showname: .... ..0. Optional Field Bit: False (cellReservedForOtherUse is NOT present)

field.showname: .... 1... Optional Field Bit: True (trackingAreaCode is present)

field.showname: .... .0.. Optional Field Bit: False (ranac is NOT present)

field.showname: ..1. .... Optional Field Bit: True (mcc is present)

field.name: nr-rrc.cellIdentity
field.showname: cellIdentity: 0000000100 [bit length 36, 4 LSB pad bits, 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0001 0000 .... decimal value 16]
